name: custom_ref::early_return::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { customRef, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = customRef(() => ({ get: () => true, set: (_value: boolean) => {} })); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { if (!guard.value) return; payload.value; });

source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.customRef(() => ({ get: () => true, set: (_value: boolean) => {} })); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(() => { if (!guard.value) return; payload.value; });

name: custom_ref::if_alternate::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { customRef, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = customRef(() => ({ get: () => true, set: (_value: boolean) => {} })); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { if (guard.value) { sink(); } else { payload.value; } });
